payload.author: claude
payload.body: Epic complete — all six stories shipped and verified: RT-94 trust new, RT-96 --message-format json, RT-93 writing-trust skill (156 lines, table generated from the live binary), RT-95 CLAUDE.md template (drift-tested, scaffolded by trust new), RT-98 plugin+marketplace (claude plugin validate green; install = 2 slash commands), RT-97 eval suite (built+validated; API run owner-gated). Cross-agent verification caught one real bug (RT-93's unquoted YAML frontmatter, found by RT-98's validator). Remaining human action in this epic: none — the RT-97 run is optional timing, tracked on its ticket.
